[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00001100 2
1 00101101 4
2 11111001 6
3 00111001 4
4 11000110 4
5 01000100 2
6 00001100 2
7 01100000 2

23 32 11111111 a

56 65 01101100 4
67 76 10011001 4
70 07 10110100 4

02 20 01110100 4

24 42 01111101 6
35 53 11001010 4

72 27 11000000 2
